nasb.text: that is, that I may be encouraged together with you while among you, each of us by the other’s faith, both yours and mine.

esv.text: that is, that we may be mutually encouraged by each other’s faith, both yours and mine.

cnv.text: 也使我在你們中間，藉著你我彼此的信心，大家一同得到安慰。

ccb.text: 也可以说是借着我们彼此的信心互相激励。

csbs.text: 这就是说，在你们那里，藉着你们和我里面彼此的信仰，大家可以同得鼓励。
